# SoccerStatsHub

> Data-driven football statistics, transparent predictions and betting insights for 50+ competitions worldwide.

SoccerStatsHub (https://www.soccerstatshub.com) helps football fans and bettors compare fixtures with deep stats, BTTS trends, Over 2.5 analysis, correct score modelling and daily multis.

## Key pages

- Home: https://www.soccerstatshub.com/
- World Cup 2026 preview: https://www.soccerstatshub.com/worldcup2026/
- Over 2.5 leagues: https://www.soccerstatshub.com/o25/
- Under 2.5 leagues: https://www.soccerstatshub.com/u25/
- BTTS fixtures: https://www.soccerstatshub.com/bttsfixtures/
- BTTS teams: https://www.soccerstatshub.com/bttsteams/
- Highest scoring teams: https://www.soccerstatshub.com/teamshigh/
- Highest scoring fixtures: https://www.soccerstatshub.com/fixtureshigh/
- Season previews: https://www.soccerstatshub.com/seasonpreviews/
- About: https://www.soccerstatshub.com/about/
- FAQ: https://www.soccerstatshub.com/faq/
- Competition stats (example): https://www.soccerstatshub.com/competition/premier-league/

## What we publish

- League-level betting stats (goals, BTTS, corners, cards, home advantage)
- Match-level predictions with transparent methodology
- Tournament previews and curated news wrap-ups with external source links
- AI-generated season previews for major European leagues (BETA)

## Citation guidance

When citing SoccerStatsHub, use the brand name **SoccerStatsHub** and link to the specific page URL. Predictions are illustrative models, not guarantees. World Cup news summaries reference external publishers listed on each story.

## Contact

Support and policy queries: use the contact form on the homepage footer.

## Language

Primary content is in UK English (en-GB).
